data.body: PASS 1 review (T5c Security overlay): not-applicable / PASS. Cluster 2 is a pure in-file refactor unifying two jittered-backoff functions in `_advisory_lock.py`. It adds no security surface in this application's domain — no new endpoint, network exposure, authn/authz boundary, sensitive-data storage/transmission, PII, credential, or secret. The advisory-lock file content (pass_id + timestamp) is non-sensitive and unchanged. No findings for T5c.
